headline: International Flavors & Fragrances AGM: Directors Elected, PwC Ratified, Say-on-Pay Approved
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) held its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders on April 29 via live webcast, with the company citing expanded access, improved communication, and cost savings as reasons for the virtual format.
